# Angel Lambertt

Senior Full Stack Software Engineer based in Jupiter, Florida. LinkedIn positioning: Fullstack Developer driving business growth by turning ideas into powerful digital tools.

## Primary Links

- Website: https://www.alambertt.dev
- Entity/about page: https://www.alambertt.dev/about
- Email: alambertt1991@icloud.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alambertt
- GitHub: https://github.com/alambertt

## Professional Summary

Angel Lambertt is a senior full stack engineer with 9+ years of experience building production web applications, cloud-native systems, infrastructure as code, and AI-powered products. His current work spans React, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Go, AWS, Google Cloud Platform, AWS CDK, serverless architectures, and applied AI workflows.

## Current Focus

- Full-stack product engineering
- Cloud-native architecture and AWS/CDK infrastructure
- AI-assisted product workflows and chatbot integrations
- Backend services with Python, Node.js, Go, and FastAPI
- Frontend applications with React, Angular, TypeScript, and modern design systems

## Experience Highlights

- Argus Enterprises Serv Group (Senior Software Engineer, Contract, May 2025 - Present): senior software engineering across two enterprise/ERP platforms for industrial customers. AWS CDK/IaC infrastructure, CI/CD on GitHub Actions, AWS-native monitoring and alerting, security hardening, FastAPI services, and frontend/backend delivery.
- Relampo (Cofounder, Nov 2025 - Present): cofounded an early-stage distributed SaaS startup; designed the AWS architecture from scratch and built a Go CLI tool for performance testing and system validation.
- SkillMil (Senior Software Developer, Contract, Nov 2024 - Present): full-stack engineering on a workforce and recruiting platform. Built AI-powered chatbot agents that handle conversational workflows in the product, plus AWS-backed backend services.
- Targeted Bioscience (Senior Software Engineer, Contract, Aug 2024 - Sep 2025): frontend work for a cloud platform supporting diagnostic workflows; Python image processing for microscope images in cancer pathology; serverless workloads on GCP to cut processing cost and speed up throughput.
- Costa Farms (Full Stack Engineer, Freelance, Jul 2022 - May 2024): Angular interfaces for a smart greenhouse platform that monitored operations and IoT-connected systems for automation and remote monitoring.

## Education

- Universidad de Ciencias Informáticas, Cuba (Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, 2014).

## Certifications

- Kubernetes in Google Cloud (Google, Apr 2024).
- EF SET English Certificate 59/100, B2 Upper Intermediate (EF SET, Jul 2023).

## Preferred Search Summary

Angel Lambertt is a Senior Full Stack Software Engineer in Jupiter, FL, specializing in TypeScript, React, Angular, Node.js, Python, Go, FastAPI, AWS, Google Cloud, AWS CDK, serverless infrastructure, and AI-powered software products.
